user_query:
Help us set up a durable memory workflow for our agent and apply it to a weekly marketing review. Please read input/workspace_overview.md (our workspace context and privacy rules), input/daily_logs.tsv (last week’s log snippets), and input/marketing_brief.yaml (business context). Then:

1) Initialize a three-layer memory structure under output/: create output/MEMORY.md with curated long-term sections and privacy notes; create today’s daily log at output/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md summarizing what you did in this task; add memory rules to output/AGENTS.md and a weekly maintenance section to output/HEARTBEAT.md.

2) Distill important decisions and lessons from input/daily_logs.tsv into output/MEMORY.md (update Key Decisions and Lessons Learned), and produce a maintenance report at output/maintenance_report.md listing what you integrated and what you chose not to keep.

3) Using input/marketing_brief.yaml, produce a strategic analysis at output/marketing/analysis.json (include keys: analysis_id, market_opportunities[], target_segments[], recommended_actions[], risks[], next_steps[], confidence_level) and a campaign plan at output/marketing/campaign_plan.json (decompose actions into tasks with owners, deadlines, expected_result). Reflect any critical decisions into output/MEMORY.md.

4) Validate the created Markdown files (output/MEMORY.md, output/AGENTS.md, output/HEARTBEAT.md, output/maintenance_report.md, output/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md) for broken local links and output the linter report to output/lint_report.json with fields: totalFiles, brokenLinksCount, details[].

5) Track your progress by writing output/tasks/progress.json that includes taskId, taskName, status ('done' when complete), startedAt, updatedAt, finishedAt, and steps[] (each step has name and status).

Do not include raw sensitive data from input in any outputs; summarize where necessary. If you need to create any additional helper files, put them under output/.
